search_queries_used: site:mohap.gov.ae Practical Guideline Management Tobacco Dependence 2024 PDF
site:dha.gov.ae smoking history pack years cough guideline PDF
site:nice.org.uk/guidance/ng12 smoking cough haemoptysis weight loss
rejection_reasons: Commercial pages were not accepted as authoritative sources.
Patient calculators do not provide clinician-documentation guidance.
Medicine names and doses were explicitly excluded from mapping.
population_applicability: Broadly applicable to tobacco users, recent quitters, non-users, and people exposed to second-hand smoke; individual product and dependence assessment remains clinician-led.
setting_applicability: Direct for UAE clinical tobacco-status documentation and cessation-support review; respiratory investigation fields require separate qualified assessment.
UAE_applicability: Direct UAE MoHAP guidance, with DHA respiratory history and international NICE suspected-cancer evidence used only as supporting context.
recency_verification: The official MoHAP guideline PDF and launch page, current DHA cough guideline, and current NICE NG12 page were opened on 2026-07-13.
superseded_check: No newer official MoHAP tobacco-dependence guideline or DHA cough issue was identified; NG12 remains current.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Supports mapped UAE tobacco-status, second-hand-exposure, and workflow identity fields.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports healthcare-provider use, tobacco-status identification and documentation, cessation support, and second-hand-smoke exposure context.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Supports mapped smoking-rate, current or former status, quit attempts, motivation, barriers, and assessment fields.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports current and former tobacco status, product use, willingness and readiness to quit, previous attempts, motivation, confidence, barriers, and dependence assessment including smoking rate and time to first cigarette.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Supports mapped clinician-discussed cessation advice, support, pharmacotherapy, referral, and follow-up documentation without medicine names or doses.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports clinician-documented counselling, support, pharmacotherapy discussion, referral, and arranged follow-up without mapping medicine names or doses.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Supports mapped former-smoker and previous-attempt review fields.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports documenting recent abstinence, remaining challenges, relapse risk, prior success, repeated intervention, and follow-up.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Supports mapped years, pack-years, occupational exposure, and respiratory-symptom history fields.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Specifies cough duration, quality, timing, risk factors, and associated-symptom history domains.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Supports mapped smoking-context cough, haemoptysis, and weight-loss warning prompts with recommendation-specific qualifiers preserved.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports clinician recognition of unexplained haemoptysis and age- and smoking-context combinations involving unexplained cough, fatigue, breathlessness, chest pain, weight loss, appetite loss, recurrent chest infection, clubbing, lymphadenopathy, or chest signs.

unresolved_source_gaps: Years smoked and pack years are supported only as respiratory-history fields, not as a validated calculation workflow.
Generic respiratory-negative wording, examination fields, chest imaging, spirometry, generic clinician plan, fixed follow-up ranges, PRN wording, and the combined history draft remain unsupported.
Cancer-risk interpretation, investigation selection, cessation treatment choice, medicine dosing, and qualified clinician review remain clinician responsibilities.
